title: Phyllanthus hosokawae
taxonomy: Phyllanthus hosokawae is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The genus Phyllanthus is part of the order Malpighiales. It is classified as a type of succulent plant. Phyllanthus hosokawae is native to Japan and grows in rocky, mountainous areas. As part of the Phyllanthaceae family, it is closely related to other plants such as the genus Breynia.
